scripts.dev: npx supabase status || npx supabase start && npm -w web run dev
scripts.test:e2e: npx supabase status || npx supabase start && vitest run tests/api/e2e
scripts.test:integration:live:default: : "${AI_PROFILE_DEFAULT_MODEL:?AI_PROFILE_DEFAULT_MODEL is required}" && AI_LIVE=1 AI_PROFILE=default AI_MODEL="$AI_PROFILE_DEFAULT_MODEL" vitest run tests/api/integration/live-ai
scripts.test:integration:live:cost-control: : "${AI_PROFILE_COST_CONTROL_MODEL:?AI_PROFILE_COST_CONTROL_MODEL is required}" && AI_LIVE=1 AI_PROFILE=cost_control AI_MODEL="$AI_PROFILE_COST_CONTROL_MODEL" vitest run tests/api/integration/live-ai
scripts.test:e2e:live:default: : "${AI_PROFILE_DEFAULT_MODEL:?AI_PROFILE_DEFAULT_MODEL is required}" && AI_LIVE=1 AI_PROFILE=default AI_MODEL="$AI_PROFILE_DEFAULT_MODEL" vitest run tests/api/e2e/live-ai-flow.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:live:cost-control: : "${AI_PROFILE_COST_CONTROL_MODEL:?AI_PROFILE_COST_CONTROL_MODEL is required}" && AI_LIVE=1 AI_PROFILE=cost_control AI_MODEL="$AI_PROFILE_COST_CONTROL_MODEL" vitest run tests/api/e2e/live-ai-flow.test.ts
scripts.test:live: npm run test:integration:live:default && npm run test:integration:live:cost-control && npm run test:e2e:live:default && npm run test:e2e:live:cost-control
scripts.test:all: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm -w web run check && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e && npm -w web run test:e2e
